conflict: Noreen discovers bookmaker IOUs and evidence Tom forged Elsie's savings withdrawal.
consequence: Elsie learns her husband has exposed her to legal and economic harm, not just emotional betrayal.
must_land_beats: Discovery unfolds gradually through ordinary domestic objects
Noreen chooses truth over politeness and tells Elsie directly
Elsie recalculates future options under debt threat
objective: Maintain boundaries while returning borrowed kitchenware.
